stemHtml: Which statement about Satellite Based Augmentation Systems (SBAS) is correct?

options.a: The use of SBAS improves neither the integrity nor the accuracy of the position of the user, but augments the number of satellites available.
options.b: The use of SBAS improves the accuracy of the position of the user but does not improve the integrity.
options.c: The use of SBAS improves both the accuracy and the integrity of the position of the user.
options.d: The use of SBAS improves the integrity of the position of the user but does not improve the accuracy.
